case_title: TOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS VS RODRIGUEZ,MARINA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $866.27 FILED BY TOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ,MARINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-09-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ,MARINA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ,MARINA $866.27 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $946.27, PLTF TO REPAIR LOCK/LATCH ON DEFT'S BRACELET SO THAT IT WILL BE IN REASONABLE CONDITION TO WEAR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
